You are a senior code reviewer performing a PR review for a migration task.

## Context
We are migrating code from card-place repository to rewardprogram repository. The task is MCP32275_02: Create orderDetail.model.ts

## Rules
1. NO logic changes - only structure migration
2. Minimal changes - only adapt file paths/imports
3. The code is production-tested and homologated - no improvements allowed

## Source (card-place):
```typescript
import { PointsTransaction } from './extract.model';

export enum OrderDetailStatus {
  IDLE = 'idle',
  LOADING = 'loading',
  SUCCESS = 'success',
  ERROR = 'error',
}

export interface OrderDetailState {
  orderDetail?: PointsTransaction;
  status: OrderDetailStatus;
  error?: string;
  transactionId?: string;
}
```

## Target file created at:
/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/services/models/orderDetail.model.ts

Please read the target file and verify:
1. The import path is correct (PointsTransaction should come from './extract.model')
2. The enum and interface are identical to the source
3. No unnecessary changes were made
4. File follows the project's STYLE_GUIDE.md patterns

Provide a detailed review with PASS/FAIL verdict.

content.text: Let me check if the STYLE_GUIDE exists in a different location and verify the models index file to ensure the new model is properly exported.

content.content:
1â†’# Frontend Style Guide â€” Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2â†’
     3â†’Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4â†’This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5â†’
     6â†’> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. â˜•
     7â†’
     8â†’---
     9â†’
    10â†’## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11â†’
    12â†’- [Introduction](#introduction)
    13â†’- [Components & Screens â€” Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    14â†’- [Atomic Components â€” Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    15â†’- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    16â†’- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    17â†’- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    18â†’- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    19â†’- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    20â†’- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    21â†’- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    22â†’- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    23â†’- [Checklist](#checklist)
    24â†’
    25â†’---
    26â†’
    27â†’## Introduction
    28â†’
    29â†’The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    30â†’
    31â†’Key decisions:
    32â†’
    33â†’- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    34â†’- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    35â†’- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    36â†’- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    37â†’
    38â†’---
    39â†’
    40â†’## Components & Screens â€” Hook Component Pattern
    41â†’
    42â†’Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    43â†’
    44â†’```
    45â†’screens/Home/
    46â†’â”œâ”€â”€ index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    47â†’â”œâ”€â”€ view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    48â†’â””â”€â”€ Models/
    49â†’    â””â”€â”€ index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    50â†’```
    51â†’
    52â†’**Models/index.d.ts**
    53â†’
    54â†’```ts
    55â†’export interface HomeParams {
    56â†’  welcome?: string;
    57â†’}
    58â†’export interface HomeState {
    59â†’  greeting: string;
    60â†’  isLoading: boolean;
    61â†’}
    62â†’export interface HomeHandlers {
    63â†’  onPressCTA: () => void;
    64â†’}
    65â†’export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    66â†’```
    67â†’
    68â†’**index.ts (logic hook)**
    69â†’
    70â†’```ts
    71â†’import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from 'react';
    72â†’import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from './Models';
    73â†’import { useUserStore } from '@/services/user/store'; // Zustand slice example
    74â†’
    75â†’export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    76â†’  const name = useUserStore(s => s.name);
    77â†’  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    78â†’
    79â†’  useEffect(() => {
    80â†’    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    81â†’    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    82â†’  }, []);
    83â†’
    84â†’  const greeting = useMemo(
    85â†’    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || 'guest'}!`,
    86â†’    [
    87â†’      params?.welcome,
    88â†’      name,
    89â†’    ],
    90â†’  );
    91â†’
    92â†’  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    93â†’    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    94â†’  }, []);
    95â†’
    96â†’  return {
    97â†’    greeting,
    98â†’    isLoading,
    99â†’    onPressCTA,
   100â†’  };
   101â†’}
   102â†’```
   103â†’
   104â†’**view.tsx (render)**
   105â†’
   106â†’```tsx
   107â†’import React from 'react';
   108â†’import { View } from 'react-native';
   109â†’import { Text, Button } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
   110â†’import { useHomeScreen } from './index';
   111â†’import type { HomeParams } from './Models';
   112â†’
   113â†’type Props = HomeParams;
   114â†’
   115â†’export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   116â†’  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   117â†’
   118â†’  if (isLoading) {
   119â†’    return (
   120â†’      <View>
   121â†’        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   122â†’      </View>
   123â†’    );
   124â†’  }
   125â†’
   126â†’  return (
   127â†’    <View>
   128â†’      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   129â†’      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   130â†’    </View>
   131â†’  );
   132â†’}
   133â†’```
   134â†’
   135â†’---
   136â†’
   137â†’## Atomic Components â€” Hook Component Pattern
   138â†’
   139â†’```
   140â†’atomic/atoms/Button/
   141â†’â”œâ”€â”€ index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   142â†’â”œâ”€â”€ view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   143â†’â””â”€â”€ Models/
   144â†’    â””â”€â”€ index.d.ts
   145â†’```
   146â†’
   147â†’**Models/index.d.ts**
   148â†’
   149â†’```ts
   150â†’export interface ButtonProps {
   151â†’  text: string;
   152â†’  disabled?: boolean;
   153â†’  onPress?: () => void;
   154â†’}
   155â†’export interface ButtonState {
   156â†’  pressed: boolean;
   157â†’}
   158â†’export interface ButtonHandlers {
   159â†’  handlePress: () => void;
   160â†’}
   161â†’export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   162â†’```
   163â†’
   164â†’**index.ts (logic hook)**
   165â†’
   166â†’```ts
   167â†’import { useCallback, useState } from 'react';
   168â†’import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from './Models';
   169â†’
   170â†’export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   171â†’  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   172â†’
   173â†’  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   174â†’    setPressed(true);
   175â†’    props.onPress?.();
   176â†’    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   177â†’  }, [props.onPress]);
   178â†’
   179â†’  return {
   180â†’    pressed,
   181â†’    handlePress,
   182â†’  };
   183â†’}
   184â†’```
   185â†’
   186â†’**view.tsx (render)**
   187â†’
   188â†’```tsx
   189â†’import React from 'react';
   190â†’import { Pressable, View } from 'react-native';
   191â†’import { Text } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
   192â†’import { useButton } from './index';
   193â†’import type { ButtonProps } from './Models';
   194â†’
   195â†’export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   196â†’  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   197â†’
   198â†’  return (
   199â†’    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   200â†’      <View>
   201â†’        <Text>
   202â†’          {props.text}
   203â†’          {pressed ? ' â€¢' : ''}
   204â†’        </Text>
   205â†’      </View>
   206â†’    </Pressable>
   207â†’  );
   208â†’}
   209â†’```
   210â†’
   211â†’---
   212â†’
   213â†’## Project Organization
   214â†’
   215â†’```
   216â†’src/
   217â†’â”œâ”€â”€ @types/            # Global TS types
   218â†’â”œâ”€â”€ assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   219â†’â”œâ”€â”€ atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   220â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ atoms/
   221â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ molecules/
   222â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ organisms/
   223â†’â”œâ”€â”€ modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   224â†’â”œâ”€â”€ screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   225â†’â”œâ”€â”€ services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   226â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   227â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ class/         # Class with logical requests
   228â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   229â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   230â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ services/      # Business orchestration
   231â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   232â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   233â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ models/        # Domain types & contracts
   234â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ utils/         # Reusable service helps
   235â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ index.ts       # Public exports
   236â†’â”œâ”€â”€ hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   237â†’â”œâ”€â”€ routes/            # Navigation config
   238â†’â”œâ”€â”€ settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   239â†’â””â”€â”€ utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   240â†’```
   241â†’
   242â†’> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   243â†’
   244â†’---
   245â†’
   246â†’## Services Architecture
   247â†’
   248â†’**Flow:** `UI â†’ services â†’ repository â†’ api` and `UI â†’ services â†’ store (Zustand)`
   249â†’
   250â†’- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.
   251â†’- **class/**: class with logical requests.
   252â†’- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   253â†’- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.
   254â†’- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.
   255â†’- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.
   256â†’- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).
   257â†’- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.
   258â†’- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   259â†’
   260â†’Principles:
   261â†’
   262â†’- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   263â†’- No circular dependencies.
   264â†’- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   265â†’
   266â†’---
   267â†’
   268â†’## State Management (Zustand-only)
   269â†’
   270â†’- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.
   271â†’- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.
   272â†’- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.
   273â†’- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   274â†’
   275â†’**Slice example**
   276â†’
   277â†’```ts
   278â†’import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
   279â†’import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from '../models/store';
   280â†’
   281â†’export type AuthSlice = {
   282â†’  auth: AuthState;
   283â†’  authActions: AuthActions;
   284â†’};
   285â†’
   286â†’const initialAuth = {
   287â†’  user: null,
   288â†’  loading: false,
   289â†’  error: undefined,
   290â†’};
   291â†’
   292â†’export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<
   293â†’  AuthSlice,
   294â†’  [],
   295â†’  [],
   296â†’  AuthSlice
   297â†’> = set => ({
   298â†’  auth: initialAuth,
   299â†’  authActions: {
   300â†’    setLoading: v =>
   301â†’      set(s => ({
   302â†’        auth: {
   303â†’          ...s.auth,
   304â†’          isLoading: v,
   305â†’        },
   306â†’      })),
   307â†’    setUser: v =>
   308â†’      set(s => ({
   309â†’        auth: {
   310â†’          ...s.auth,
   311â†’          user: v,
   312â†’        },
   313â†’      })),
   314â†’    setError: v =>
   315â†’      set(s => ({
   316â†’        auth: {
   317â†’          ...s.auth,
   318â†’          error: v,
   319â†’        },
   320â†’      })),
   321â†’    reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   322â†’  },
   323â†’});
   324â†’```
   325â†’
   326â†’**Root Store**
   327â†’
   328â†’- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps â€” including SuperApp.
   329â†’
   330â†’```ts
   331â†’import { create } from 'zustand';
   332â†’import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';
   333â†’import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
   334â†’
   335â†’import {
   336â†’  createUserSlice,
   337â†’  type UserSlice,
   338â†’} from '@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user';
   339â†’import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from '@semparar/mf-app-yourmf';
   340â†’
   341â†’import storage from '~/redux/store/storage';
   342â†’
   343â†’/** Add your slice Type */
   344â†’export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   345â†’
   346â†’export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   347â†’  devtools(
   348â†’    persist(
   349â†’      immer((...a) => ({
   350â†’        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   351â†’        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   352â†’      })),
   353â†’      {
   354â†’        name: 'root-storage',
   355â†’        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   356â†’        partialize: s => ({
   357â†’          user: s.user,
   358â†’          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   359â†’        }),
   360â†’        merge: (persisted, current) => ({
   361â†’          ...current,
   362â†’          ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>),
   363â†’        }),
   364â†’      },
   365â†’    ),
   366â†’    { name: 'RootStore' },
   367â†’  ),
   368â†’);
   369â†’```
   370â†’
   371â†’- For Use on Class.
   372â†’
   373â†’```ts
   374â†’class Auth {
   375â†’  private readonly setAuth;
   376â†’
   377â†’  constructor () {
   378â†’    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   379â†’  }
   380â†’
   381â†’  function doSomething(data) {
   382â†’    this.setUser({ ...data });
   383â†’  }
   384â†’}
   385â†’```
   386â†’
   387â†’- For Use on Component/Screen.
   388â†’- UI never imports the store directly â€” uses selectors
   389â†’
   390â†’```ts
   391â†’const loading = useRootStore(s => s.user.isLoading);
   392â†’const token = useRootStore(s => s.auth.token);
   393â†’```
   394â†’
   395â†’---
   396â†’
   397â†’## Routes Naming
   398â†’
   399â†’Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:
   400â†’
   401â†’- âœ… `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)
   402â†’- âœ… `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   403â†’
   404â†’---
   405â†’
   406â†’## Folder Naming Rules
   407â†’
   408â†’| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                   |
   409â†’| ----------------------------------- | ------------ | -------------------------- |
   410â†’| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails` |
   411â†’| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`   |
   412â†’
   413â†’---
   414â†’
   415â†’## Code Standards
   416â†’
   417â†’**Language**: English only.  
   418â†’**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   419â†’
   420â†’**Explanatory variables**
   421â†’
   422â†’```js
   423â†’const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   424â†’const getNumberValidation = message => value =>
   425â†’  !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   426â†’const isNumber = getNumberValidation('error message');
   427â†’isNumber(1);
   428â†’```
   429â†’
   430â†’**Semantic constants**
   431â†’
   432â†’```js
   433â†’const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   434â†’setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   435â†’```
   436â†’
   437â†’**Library workarounds with link**
   438â†’
   439â†’```js
   440â†’// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   441â†’// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   442â†’event.target.value = '';
   443â†’```
   444â†’
   445â†’**JSDoc**
   446â†’
   447â†’```js
   448â†’/**
   449â†’ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   450â†’ * @param {*} eventName
   451â†’ * @param {*} maxLength
   452â†’ */
   453â†’```
   454â†’
   455â†’**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**
   456â†’
   457â†’```ts
   458â†’useEffect(() => {
   459â†’  (async () => {
   460â†’    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   461â†’    setSum(42);
   462â†’  })();
   463â†’}, [setSum]);
   464â†’```
   465â†’
   466â†’**Extract conditions**
   467â†’
   468â†’```ts
   469â†’const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   470â†’if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   471â†’```
   472â†’
   473â†’**Optional chaining**
   474â†’
   475â†’```ts
   476â†’const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   477â†’```
   478â†’
   479â†’**JSX indentation**
   480â†’
   481â†’```tsx
   482â†’{
   483â†’  !isEnd && <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />;
   484â†’}
   485â†’```
   486â†’
   487â†’**Early returns**
   488â†’
   489â†’```ts
   490â†’if (!data) return null;
   491â†’return <View />;
   492â†’```
   493â†’
   494â†’**Nullish coalescing**
   495â†’
   496â†’```ts
   497â†’return data ?? 0;
   498â†’```
   499â†’
   500â†’---
   501â†’
   502â†’## Styles Patterns
   503â†’
   504â†’- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.
   505â†’- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   506â†’
   507â†’---
   508â†’
   509â†’## Cache Pattern
   510â†’
   511â†’Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   512â†’
   513â†’```ts
   514â†’import storage from '~/redux/store/storage';
   515â†’
   516â†’export interface CachedData<T> {
   517â†’  timestamp: number;
   518â†’  data: T;
   519â†’}
   520â†’
   521â†’export interface StorageContract<T> {
   522â†’  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   523â†’  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   524â†’  remove(): Promise<void>;
   525â†’}
   526â†’
   527â†’export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   528â†’  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   529â†’
   530â†’  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   531â†’    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   532â†’    if (!json) return null;
   533â†’    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   534â†’  }
   535â†’
   536â†’  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   537â†’    const payload: CachedData<T> = {
   538â†’      timestamp: Date.now(),
   539â†’      data,
   540â†’    };
   541â†’    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   542â†’  }
   543â†’
   544â†’  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   545â†’    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   546â†’  }
   547â†’}
   548â†’```
   549â†’
   550â†’**Guidelines**
   551â†’
   552â†’- One storage class per module/feature.
   553â†’- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   554â†’- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   555â†’- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   556â†’- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   557â†’
   558â†’---
   559â†’
   560â†’## Checklist
   561â†’
   562â†’- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   563â†’- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   564â†’- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   565â†’- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   566â†’- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   567â†’- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
